title: Presales / Solutions Sales Engineer
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $ 3000 to $ 5000 + AWS + VB
  • Training Provided
  • Working location: Northeast
  • Monday to Friday (8:30am to 5:30pm)


Job Responsibilities:


  • Promote and sell the company's products, integrated solutions, and services.
  • Work closely with the Business Development (BD) Manager in the preparation of tender bid submissions and proposals, including gathering functional and technical information and costing from in-house departments and/or from other vendors and OEM partners.
  • Responsible for pre-sales solution and proposal submission preparation for the assigned Request for Quote (RFQ) / Request for Proposal (RFP) from our clients, and promptly update the status to the relevant BD Manager
  • Participate in sales presentations, maintain technical application and presentation materials (such as digital campaigns and marketing collateral, including brochures, application notes, the company’s website, and LinkedIn).
  • Be involved and assist in the business division to explore new solutions/products to support the company’s business goals and to identify new business opportunities and expand our market share.


Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical/ Electronics/ Computer, equivalent Engineering discipline.
  • Relevant experiences in any of these SCADA/PLC solutions, Building Management System, relevant Operation Technologies (OT/IOT) solution for Power, Water, Transportation industries are preferred. Candidate with knowledge in OT network & cybersecurity solutions / Security & Surveillance solutions will have an advantage.



Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background



We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

postedCompany.description:
EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
postedCompany.name: EA RECRUITMENT PTE. LTD.
